summary:
Frontend-only regression + new-content testing for cloudDroplets.io. All 15 required sections render in correct order with zero console errors/warnings. Services accordion (3 toggles) shows expanded overview/challenge/capabilities/technologies/outcome. FAQ shadcn accordion has 10 items, item-0 open by default, single-open (opening item-2 closed item-0). Why Choose has 8 cards, Methodology has 7 numbered stages (01-07), Industries has 6 cards, Insights has 3 cards with all images loaded. Nav testids present and mobile menu opens at 390px. Contact form: empty submit shows 'Please share your name and email.' error toast; valid submit shows 'Thank you – we'll be in touch shortly.' success toast. Dark sections render readable light text (visually confirmed via screenshots).

ONE REGRESSION FOUND: Stats counter for 'Projects Complete' (value=250) remains stuck at 0+ even after full scroll into view and 5s wait — the other three counters (120+, 16, 40+) animate correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: First stats counter 'Projects Complete' stays at 0+ and never animates to 250+. The remaining 3 counters (120+, 16, 40+) work. Regression vs. iteration_2 which reported this fixed. Likely a StrictMode + useInView + RAF cleanup interaction — cleanup calls setN(value) then second mount reschedules and something aborts. Suggest either removing the setN(value) in cleanup, or gating with a hasRun ref, or dropping StrictMode double-invoke sensitivity.

action_items: Fix Stats.jsx Counter so the value=250 counter animates to 250+ (regression). Recommended: remove `setN(value)` from the effect cleanup or guard the effect against StrictMode double-invoke using a ref flag.
critical_code_review_comments: Stats.jsx Counter effect cleanup calls setN(value) which fights the RAF loop in React 18 StrictMode; use a ref to ensure single-run or set final value only on unmount not on every cleanup.
Services.jsx / new content components look clean; no console errors during full-page scroll.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only outstanding issue is the Projects Complete counter (250) rendering '0+'. All other flows (sections order, both accordions, FAQ single-collapsible, nav testids, mobile menu, contact form toasts, dark-section contrast, images loading) verified passing. Base URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Testing done on 1440x900 desktop and 390x844 mobile.
rca of the issue: Counter for value=250 stuck at 0. StrictMode double-invoke: mount → schedule RAF (start captured) → cleanup cancels RAF and setN(value) → second mount schedules new RAF with new start. In some paths the second RAF never ticks past 0 (likely because the ref/inView state re-triggers or the setN(value) from cleanup is overridden by initial setN(0) in the next mount cycle). Repro: load /, scroll gradually to stats-section, wait 5s. Fix: remove `setN(value)` from cleanup, OR guard effect with `hasAnimatedRef` so it only runs once.
